xsl:stylesheet.xsl:variable: |9-24 m|9m+|9- m|9-36 m| |9-12 m|9 m+|9 m +|10m+| |10-35 m|10 m +|10 m+|od 6 miesięcy| |od 6 do 36 miesięcy|od 6 do 18 miesięcy|od 6 do 12 miesięcy|od 5 miesięcy| |od 4 miesięcy|od 8 miesięcy|od 3 miesięcy|od 3 do 24 miesięcy| |od 3 do 18 miesięcy|od 9 do 18 miesięcy|od 10 miesięcy|od 9 miesięcy| |do 18 miesięcy|3m+|3- m|3-24 m| |3-18 m|3-12 m|3-6 m|3 m +| |3 m+|6m+|6- m|6-168 m| |6-60 m|6-48 m|6-36 m|6-35 m| |6-24 m|6-23 m|6-18 m|6-12 m| |6-9 m|8- m|8 m+|4-24 m| |4 m +|4 m+|6 m +|6 m+| |5 m+|5 m +|

|12- m|12m+|12-72 m|12-60 m| |12-36 miesięcy|12-36 m|12-35 m|12-24 m| |12-23 m|12-18 m|12+ miesięcy|16 m +| |15m+|12 m +|od 2,5 lat|od 2 lat| |od 2 do 4 lat|od 1,5 roku|od 14 miesięcy|od 30 miesięcy| |od 24 miesięcy|od 18 miesięcy|od 15 miesięcy|od 12 miesięcy do 3 lat| |od 12 miesięcy|od 12 miesiąca|od 1 roku|24-60 m| |24- m|24-96 m|24-72 m|24-68 m| |24-36 m|24-35 m|18m+|18- m| |18-96 m|18-36 m|18-35 m|18+ miesięcy| |18 m +|do 4 lat|do 3 lat|2-4 lata| |2-4 lat|2+ lat|2 lata +|

|12 lat +|9 lat +|11 lat +|10 lat +| |od 4 lat|od 7 lat|od 6 lat|od 5 lat| |od 5 do 99 lat|od 4 do 8 lat|od 3-7 lat|od 3 lat| |od 3 do 7 lat|od 8 lat|od 36 miesięcy|od 9 lat| |od 12 lat|od 12 l|od 11 lat|od 10 lat| |36-72 m|36-60 m|36-50 m|36-48 m| |36-84 m|36-78 m|36-96 m|72- m| |108- m|96-720 m|72-168 m|36-99 m| |60-96 m|60-90 m|48- m|48-720 m| |48-144 m|48-96 m|48-50 m|36- m| |36-144 m|36-108 m|3-6 lat|3-5 lat| |3-4 lata , 5-7 lat|3-4 lata|3+ lat|3 lata +| |3 lata|8-11 lat|8 lat +|7 lat +| |7-9 lat|6-12 lat|4 lata +|6 lat +| |5-7 lat , 8-11 lat , 12-14 lat|5 lat +|
|13 lat +|12-14 lat, 15+ lat|16 lat +|14 lat +| |od 18 lat|od 16 lat|od 15 lat|od 14 lat| |od 13 lat|18 lat +|168- m|

|Nawashi Riko|Barbara Fuchs|Pentagon U.S. Military|Wells K.C.|The Other Journal|Richard Foley|Isshika Haruka|Dian Hanson|Franklin Juhl|Ben Sinninger|Victoria Rush|Ca$h|Leon Degrelle|Jean-Marie Le Pen|Jurgen Graf|Leon Degrelle|Carlo Mattongo|Douglas Reed|Henry Ford|Robert Brasillach|Zdzisław Ciesiołkiewicz|Feliksa Eger|Adam Gmurczyk|Tomasz Greniuch|Derek Holland|David Irving|Teodor Jeske-Choiński|Hennecke Kardel|Józef Kruszyński|Andrew Macdonald|Eligiusz Niewiadomski|Jerzy Robert Nowak|Michał Poradowski|August Rohling|Felix Steiner|Bolesław Tejkowski|Hugon Wast|Emily White|

xsl:for-each.select: /offer/products/product[ price/@gross > 0 and description/name/. != '' and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '1909') and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '2806') and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '2081') and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '1614')]

xsl:if.test: not(contains($zbanowani_autorzy, $autor_wer)) and not ( @id = '2091856' or @id = '1394822' or @id= '2363175' or @id = '442704' or @id= '504250' or @id= '899184' or @id= '1475524' or @id= '2106734' or @id = '323919' or @id= '409851' or @id= '1044393' or @id= '311511' or @id= '2576201' or @id = '726369' or @id= '1038139' or @id= '1044409' or @id= '1428808' or @id= '2583335' or @id = '508823' or @id= '546037' or @id= '2587647' or @id= '2587648' or @id= '2584642' or @id = '2587649' or @id= '2587650' or @id= '1774865' or @id= '1780077' or @id= '2589464' or @id = '2017599' or @id= '2093820' or @id= '2099819' or @id= '2420026' or @id= '2594710' or @id = '2589447' or @id= '2594709' or @id= '2595049' or @id= '492340' or @id= '290134' or @id = '510190' or @id= '563663' or @id= '1365852' or @id= '1776049' or @id= '396358' or @id = '436799' or @id= '1855996' or @id= '2011464' or @id= '2043426' or @id= '2420030' or @id = '350270' or @id= '363900' or @id= '1012710' or @id= '1106760' or @id= '1365869' or @id = '2437461' or @id= '2583006' or @id= '2604672' or @id= '511560' or @id= '1930006' or @id = '2596641' or @id= '1705043' or @id= '2451009' or @id= '2454506' or @id= '2457104' or @id = '2457105' or @id= '2475856' or @id= '2479482' or @id= '2480325' or @id= '2626407' or @id = '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id = '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id = '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' or @id= '00000' ) and not( contains($tekst,'alprazolam') or contains($tekst,'xanax') or contains($tekst,'misoprostol') or contains($tekst,'przeciwwirus') or contains($tekst,'antystresowy') or contains($tekst,'rewolwer') or contains($tekst,'nóż') or contains($tekst,'nożyk') or contains($tekst,'multitool') or contains($tekst,'desert eagle') or contains($tekst,'cielesne rozkosze') or contains($tekst,'romans erotyczny') or contains($tekst,'incest') or contains($tekst,'miecz ') or contains($tekst,'sword') or contains($tekst,'hentai') or contains($tekst,'naked') or contains($tekst,'nudity') or contains($tekst,'nagość') or contains($tekst,'leczenie') or contains($tekst,'leczyć') or contains($tekst,'dieta') or contains($tekst,'noże') or contains($tekst,'chlorek magnezu') or contains($tekst,'encyklopedia zdrowia') or contains($tekst,'kontaktologia ') or contains($tekst,'przeciwzapalny') or contains($tekst,'leczymy') or contains($tekst,'kuracje') or contains($tekst,'zdrowe oczy') or contains($tekst,'mein kampf') or contains($tekst,'cock') or contains($tekst,'boobs') or contains($tekst,'erotic') or contains($tekst,'sperm') or contains($tekst,'tarot') or contains($tekst,'penis') or contains($tekst,'piersi') or contains($tekst,'sex') or contains($tekst,'wagina') or contains($tekst,'vagina') or contains($tekst,'sessuale') or contains($tekst,'seks') or contains($tekst,'cipa') or contains($tekst,'cipek') or contains($tekst,'marihuana') or contains($tekst,'marijuana') or contains($tekst,'łuk') or contains($tekst,'pistolet') or contains($tekst,'broń') or contains($tekst,'karabin') or contains($tekst,'glock') or contains($tekst,'shotgun') or contains($tekst,'strzelba') or contains($tekst,'gun') or contains($tekst,'zestaw wojskowy') or contains($tekst,'wyrzutnia') or contains($tekst,'książki religijne') or contains($tekst,'kamasutra') or contains($tekst,'erotyka') or contains($tekst,'koks'))

xsl:when.test: (../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN10' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN8' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN14' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN12' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'UPCE') and @code_producer!='' and not(starts-with(@code_producer, '2') or starts-with(@code_producer, '02') or starts-with(@code_producer, '04'))

translate($cleanedToken,$lowerLetters,'') != '' and string-length(translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and (translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='ml' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='l' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='g' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='kg' )
